title: Talent card · Inside Career Hub
description: A new 'Talent card' tab on the Career Hub employee profile, next to Development plans. Web-native (not print) and fully responsive across desktop, tablet, and mobile. Profile header uses Octuple's ProductBackground (career-hub chevron art) with a self-contained profile card on the left. The 'Open to mentoring' toggle is the real Octuple v2.5 Switch (gallery-canonical, sourced from Octuple svg files/Toggle (switch) ✅.svg) — 22×42px track, white-bg/grey-thumb when off, light-teal-bg/blue-thumb when on. Talent card body has a context bar (Talent review · 2026 + Share/Export), quick-facts strip, Current snapshot (skills + positions timeline + external history + gigs) and Future plans (development opportunities + career goals as grey Tags size=24 + skills to develop + development actions with progress bars). Uses real Octuple SkillTag (sm), Tag (grey/24), Pill, NumberBadge, Button, Navbar, ProductBackground.
author: ypike-eightfold
